channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: SmartGit portable 24.1.2-41
item.description:
Release of SmartGit portable 24.1.2-41 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the SmartGit portable page.

item.title: Signal portable 7.49.0-10
item.description:
Release of Signal portable 7.49.0-10 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Signal portable page.

item.title: Portapps 3.16.0
item.description:
• Go 1.24 (#394
  • Bump github.com/josephspurrier/goversioninfo from 1.4.1 to 1.5.0 (#393)
  • Bump github.com/rs/zerolog from 1.33.0 to 1.34.0 (#392)
  • Bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.9.0 to 1.10.0 (#384)
  • Bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.27.0 to 0.32.0 (#387 #391 #395)
